reason: Publish BatikCraft Studio 0.8.4: fixes choppy, laggy drawing in the raster paint preview. Every mouse-motion event was rebuilding the brush engine and re-rendering the whole viewport into a new PhotoImage, which saturated at high motion rates. Now the brush engine is built once per stroke, and live feedback uses a cheap native Tk line overlay while stamping to the bitmap; the full render with real pixels happens once on release.
